projectDescription: An Android app that detects VPNs, proxies, and censorship circumvention tools on a device using Roskomnadzor-style detection methodology.
keyFeatures: Six parallel detection modules covering GeoIP, network capabilities, routing, DNS, and bypass scanning
Verdict engine with weighted signal matrix producing NOT_DETECTED, NEEDS_REVIEW, or DETECTED outcomes
Xray/V2Ray gRPC API scanning to detect active proxy cores
Localhost proxy scanner (SOCKS5 and HTTP CONNECT) across ports 1024–65535
VPN app catalog with signatures for 20+ known VPN/proxy applications
Location-based detection using MCC, SIM, cell towers, Wi-Fi, and BeaconDB
Underlying network leak detection when VPN is active
Privacy mode to mask IP addresses in the UI
DNS-over-HTTPS resolver support with configurable upstream servers
Multilingual UI: English, Russian, Persian, and Chinese
publicApiSurface: VpnCheckRunner.run(context, settings, onUpdate) — runs all checkers in parallel and returns CheckResult
VerdictEngine.evaluate(geoIp, directSigns, indirectSigns, locationSignals, bypassResult) — computes final Verdict
CheckSettings — configuration for split tunnel, network requests, DNS resolver, and port range
CheckUpdate sealed interface — streaming updates: GeoIpReady, DirectSignsReady, BypassProgress, VerdictReady, etc.
VpnAppCatalog.signatures — list of known VPN/proxy app signatures
VpnAppCatalog.findByPackageName(packageName) — look up a VPN app by package name
CategoryResult — result model for each detection category with findings and evidence items
BypassResult — result model for bypass/proxy scan including proxy endpoint and IP comparison
EvidenceSource enum — categorizes evidence by origin (GEO_IP, SYSTEM_PROXY, XRAY_API, etc.)
